{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-415", "name": "Double Free"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-416", "name": "Use After Free"}], "description": "`InlineVec::clear()` and `SerVec::clear()` in `rkyv` were not panic-safe. Both functions iterate over their elements and call `drop_in_place` on each, updating `self.len` only *after* the loop. If an element's `Drop` implementation panics during the loop, `self.len` is left at its original value.

A subsequent invocation of `clear()` on the same container then re-visits the already-freed elements:

- `InlineVec::clear()` is called again from `InlineVec`'s own `Drop` implementation when the value is later dropped.
- `SerVec::clear()` is called again by `SerVec::with_capacity()` after the  user closure returns.


## Technical Impact

- **CWE-415 (Double Free):** Heap corruption when element type holds `Box<T>`  
- **CWE-416 (Use-After-Free):** Memory corruption when element reads from heap during `Drop`

Both vulnerabilities are triggerable entirely from safe Rust via `std::panic::catch_unwind` and require no special privileges.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vfvv-c25p-m7mm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-15T18:09:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vfvv-c25p-m7mm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vfvv-c25p-m7mm"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-15T18:09:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/rkyv/rkyv/commit/5828cf5c27b664eb4432c4a93d4769e12e5e42fb", "https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2026-0122.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vfvv-c25p-m7mm"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/rkyv/rkyv", "summary": "rkyv: Panic safety bugs in `InlineVec::clear` and `SerVec::clear` enable arbitrary code execution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-15T18:09:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vfvv-c25p-m7mm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.8.16", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "rkyv"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.8.0, < 0.8.16"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: rkyv: Panic safety bugs in `InlineVec::clear` and `SerVec::clear` enable arbitrary code execution
